title: Disaster-Recovery App
summary: Java/Spring Boot + MS SQL platform replacing manual, Excel-based DR workflows for an enterprise team. Recognised with the Kau Mau Te Wehi Award.

title: Tree Height Estimation
summary: Street-view computer-vision pipeline estimating tree height and species. Master's research project at UofA.

title: Floor-Plan Estimation
summary: CV/ML pipeline detecting and estimating features from 2D floor plans, reducing manual labelling effort during the internship.
